description: Style Note This forever classic and trendy red bag from murcia is a closet essential. Perfect for colour blocking and mix-and-match ensembles, make this piece your go-to essential to add a fresh twist to off-duty staples. Product Details Leatherette upper with contrast stitch detailing for durability One main zipped compartment with two zipped pockets and two insert pockets Two zipped compartments on either side of the main compartment with an inner zipped pocket and a mobile pouch Two press buttoned closures on the sides of the main compartment Two short handles for carrying ease Stud and pleated detail on the front and back for style Zipped pocket on the back Material and Care Leatherette Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust Size Height: 24 cm Width: 34 cm Depth: 11 cm
